description: Bibliothèque de bruitages bundlés (Mode Spectacle V2). Chaque tag = un MP3 one-shot court généré via ElevenLabs Sound Generation API. Claude est contraint de ne citer que ces tags dans les scripts d'histoire. ~58 tags couvrent 95% des récits enfants.

entries.prompt: Old wooden door slowly creaking open, gentle and slightly eerie, single creak, no other sounds
Wooden door slamming shut firmly, single quick impact, slight reverb
Light door opening with a small squeak, gentle and brief, single motion
Soft footsteps on wooden floor, three or four steps at calm walking pace, no other ambience
Footsteps walking on grass and dry leaves, three or four steps, gentle rustling
Footsteps crunching softly on fresh snow, three or four steps at calm pace
Footsteps on stone floor, three or four steps echoing slightly in a stone hall
Mighty dragon roar, deep guttural sound, powerful but short, single roar with slight echo
Single loud lion roar, deep and proud, no other animals
Single bear growl-roar, low rumble, short and clear
Wolf low growl rising slightly, single short menacing growl, no howl
Single soft cat meow, gentle and friendly, kitten-like
Friendly dog bark, two short barks, medium-sized dog
Owl hooting twice softly in a quiet forest, gentle nighttime call
Single small bird chirp, cheerful and short, no background
Tiny mouse squeak, very short and cute, single high-pitched squeak
Soft puppy whimper-whine, gentle and brief, sad but cute
Gentle soft wind blowing through leaves, calm breeze, peaceful
Strong gusting wind, no rain, powerful but not violent, dramatic
Light rain pattering on leaves, calm and gentle, no thunder
Single distant rolling thunder rumble, far away, soft and deep, no rain
Cozy fireplace crackling and popping softly, warm and intimate, small fire
Single medium splash of water, like a small object dropped in a pond
Slow water drops dripping in a quiet cave, three drops with reverb
Small forest stream gently flowing over stones, peaceful babbling brook
Magical sparkle shimmer, bright twinkling sound, brief and enchanting, no music
Magical whoosh as a spell is cast, ascending shimmer, brief and ethereal
Magical transformation effect, shimmer rising and resolving, fairytale style
Quick magical zap-pop, single spell impact, sparkly not aggressive
Single soft magical chime, fairy bell tone, ascending shimmer, gentle
Old grandfather clock ticking slowly, four steady ticks, peaceful
Mechanical gears slowly turning and creaking, brief metallic motion
Friendly robot beep-boop, short cute electronic sequence, three notes
Soft electronic machine hum activating, gentle rising tone, sci-fi
Single small bell ringing once, like a bicycle bell or door chime, clear and bright
Single large church bell tolling once, deep resonant, single strike with decay
Soft harp glissando ascending, magical fairytale, single sweep
Gentle music box melody playing four notes, vintage and dreamy, no other sounds
Old wooden ship creaking with gentle sea movement, calm and atmospheric
Horse galloping briefly, four hoofbeats, no other sounds
Distant train whistle blowing once, nostalgic, brief and clear
Single short happy child laugh, joyful and innocent, no other sounds
Single small surprised gasp, soft and gentle, child-like
Tiny cute sneeze, soft and brief, child or animal
Soft sleepy yawn, gentle and relaxed, ending with a small sigh
Single gold coin dropping onto a hard surface and bouncing, bright metallic
Old wooden treasure chest creaking open with metallic clasps, single motion
Bunch of metal keys jingling once, brief and clear
Mysterious low whoosh passing by, slightly eerie but gentle, single sweep
Soft playful friendly ghost woo, gentle and brief, not scary
Single old floorboard creaking under weight, gentle and brief
Single page of an old book turning gently, soft paper rustle
Single small soap bubble popping, soft and cute
Tiny water splash like a pebble in a pond, brief and gentle
Three soft knocks on a wooden door, polite and clear
Small crowd cheering happily for a moment, warm and joyful, brief
Small crowd gasping in surprise once, brief collective inhale
